buildCommand: cd qietr-sdk && npm install && npm run build && cd ../qietr-web && npm install && npm run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' data:; worker-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self' https://*.helius-rpc.com https://*.solana.com https://api.devnet.solana.com https://*.onrender.com https://*.vercel.app; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'
